senses.definition: an electronic device that stores and processes data

examples.x: He upgraded the computer's software for better performance.
I use my computer to browse the internet and check emails.
She customized the desktop wallpaper on her computer.
She uses a computer to create digital art.
The computer has a large storage capacity for files.

senses.definition: facts or knowledge related to a thing or person

examples.x: She shared important information about the upcoming event.
The map provides useful information for navigation.
The museum exhibit offered educational information about ancient civilizations.
The website has a search bar to find specific information.
We use computers to access vast amounts of information online.

senses.definition: the online exchange of messages between people on the Internet

examples.x: He initiated a private chat to ask a personal question.
I had a fun chat with my friend on social media yesterday.
Let's have a quick chat to discuss the project.
The online chat provides a platform for group discussions.
They had a long chat about their travel experiences.

senses.definition: a small computer that you can take with you wherever you go, and it sits on your lap or a table so you can use it

examples.x: He bought a new laptop with better processing speed.
He opened his laptop to check his emails and messages.
I need to charge my laptop; the battery is running low.
My brother uses his laptop for studying and online classes.
She carries her laptop with her wherever she goes.

senses.definition: a screen that shows information or images generated by a computer

examples.x: I prefer a large monitor for graphic design work.
My eyes get tired after staring at the monitor for a long time.
She cleaned the monitor to remove fingerprints and smudges.
The monitor's energy-saving mode helps conserve power.
The monitor's size is perfect for gaming and watching movies.

senses.definition: the flat panel on a television, computer, etc. on which images and information are displayed

examples.x: During the presentation, the speaker shared his screen with the audience.
I adjusted the brightness of the screen to reduce eye strain.
She cleaned the screen of her laptop to remove smudges.
The screen of my phone is cracked, so I need to get it fixed.

senses.definition: a series of keys on a board or touchscreen that we can press or tap to type on a computer, typewriter, smartphone, etc.

examples.x: He pressed the keys on the keyboard to enter the password.
He used a virtual keyboard on the touch screen.
The laptop's keyboard is comfortable to use for long periods.
The new keyboard layout took some time to get used to.
The wireless keyboard connected to the computer seamlessly.

senses.definition: a small, handheld device that we move across a flat surface to move the cursor on a computer screen

examples.x: He scrolled down the webpage using the scroll wheel on the mouse.
I need to buy a new mouse for my computer because the old one stopped working.
The click of the mouse can be heard whenever she makes a selection.
The gaming mouse has extra buttons for quick actions in games.
The touchpad on a laptop serves the same function as an external mouse.

senses.definition: a machine, particularly one connected to a computer, that prints text or pictures onto paper

examples.x: He loaded the paper tray of the printer with fresh sheets.
The printer supports various paper sizes, including A4 and Letter.
The printer is compatible with both Windows and Mac computers.
The printer ran out of ink, so we need to replace the cartridge.
The school's computer lab has several printers for student use.

senses.definition: a type of disc used to store a lot of files, games, music, videos, etc.
a small electronic device or software used to do mathematical operations

examples.x: Please pass me the calculator so I can check my answer.
She finds it more convenient to use a calculator than doing mental math.
The calculator has a memory function for storing results.
The calculator helped me quickly add up the numbers.
The teacher allowed us to use calculators during the test.

senses.definition: a unique identifier or name chosen by a user to represent themselves or their account in online platforms, websites, or social media

examples.x: His username is a combination of his initials and birth year.
Remember to write down your username somewhere safe.
She chose a unique username for her online account.
The website won't let me use that username; it's already taken.
Your username will be your email address.

senses.definition: a secret group of letters or numbers that allows access to a computer system or service

examples.x: Don't forget to change your password regularly for security.
Don't share your password with anyone, even with friends.
For added security, the system uses a two-factor authentication in addition to the password.
Her password consists of a combination of letters and numbers.
It's essential to keep your password confidential.

senses.definition: ‌a global computer network that allows users around the world to communicate with each other and exchange information

examples.x: Can you recommend any good websites on the Internet?
He uses the Internet to listen to music and stream movies.
She spends a lot of time on the Internet, browsing social media.
The Internet has transformed how we connect, work, and entertain ourselves.
The Internet is a vast source of knowledge and entertainment.

senses.definition: a group of related data on the Internet with the same domain name published by a specific individual, organization, etc.

examples.x: I bookmarked the website for future reference.
The company has a user-friendly website for customers to shop online.
The website allows users to connect with others who share similar interests.
The website has a section for frequently asked questions.
This website provides useful tips for learning English.

senses.definition: all the information in one part of a website

examples.x: He bookmarked his favorite web page to easily access it later.
I always check their web page for upcoming events and promotions.
I shared the link to the web page with my friends.
She learned how to code and design a web page on her own.
The web page displays the latest news headlines.

senses.definition: connected to other computer networks through the Internet

examples.x: The company sells its products through an online marketplace.
The online banking system is convenient and secure.
The online library has a vast collection of e-books.
The school provides online resources for students.
This online dictionary helps me with unfamiliar words.

senses.definition: a system that is used to send and receive messages or documents via a network

examples.x: He signed up for the newsletter and receives updates via email.
I use email to share photos with my family and friends.
She received an important document via email.
We exchanged contact information through email.
We use email to communicate with our colleagues at work.

senses.definition: a written or spoken piece of information or communication sent to or left for another person

examples.x: I left a message for my friend on her voicemail.
I received a message on social media inviting me to a gathering.
I sent a quick message to let them know I'll be late.
The email contained an important business message.

senses.definition: a recording of sounds and images that are moving

examples.x: My friend shared a heartwarming video of her baby's first steps.
The teacher showed us an educational video about space exploration.
We enjoyed watching a video of a fireworks display on New Year's Eve.
We recorded a video of our family vacation at the beach.
We watched a video tutorial on how to bake a cake.

senses.definition: a piece of writing, image, etc. published online, usually on a social media website or application, or a blog

examples.x: I read an interesting post about cooking tips on a food blog.
She shared a funny meme on her social media post.
The viral post sparked a lively discussion among users.
They published a thought-provoking post on environmental awareness.
They shared a post to raise awareness about an upcoming charity event.

senses.definition: a spoken or written remark that expresses an opinion or reaction

examples.x: He replied to my comment with a detailed explanation.
I always read the comments to see what others think about the article.
I received comments from friends who enjoyed my travel photos.
She posted a question, and I replied with a helpful comment.
The comedian's post received numerous humorous comments.

senses.definition: a series of letters and other characters that identifies a destination for email messages or the location of a website

examples.x: He copied the website address and shared it with his friends.
The website address is case-sensitive, so make sure to type it correctly.

senses.definition: a collection of data stored together in a computer, under a particular name

examples.x: After finishing the design, she saved the file as a PNG.
He transferred the audio file from his phone to the computer.
I saved the document as a Word file on my computer.
Please attach the PDF file to the email as soon as possible.
The computer has limited storage for large files.

senses.definition: a piece of written work that has a name and is stored on a computer

examples.x: I need to create a new document for my school project.
She sent the presentation document to her supervisor for feedback.
The presentation document is ready for the meeting.
This document contains essential guidelines for the project.
You can find the receipt in the scanned document folder.

senses.definition: to add data to a computer from the Internet or another computer

examples.x: She downloaded the app to keep track of her daily activities.
She's excited to download the new game on her computer.
The app allows users to download videos for offline viewing.
The website allows users to download free music.
You can download the document by clicking the link.

senses.definition: to send an electronic file such as a document, image, etc. from one digital device to another one, often by using the Internet

examples.x: After editing the photo, she will upload it to her online portfolio.
Please upload your assignment to the online platform before the deadline.
The students were asked to upload their presentations to the class website.
The website allows users to upload their own videos and share them with others.
They will upload the recording of the webinar for those who missed it.

senses.definition: to select an item or function from a computer screen, etc. using a mouse or touchpad

examples.x: To save your document, simply click the "Save" option.
Click and drag the file to move it to a different folder.
If you want to copy text, click and hold the left mouse button.
To open the document, click on the file icon and then select "Open."

senses.definition: ‌to send a message to someone by email

examples.x: Don't forget to email the registration form before the deadline.
He emailed the photos of the vacation to his family.
I'll email you the link to the online event.
They emailed the professor to ask for an extension on the assignment.
We can email the brochure to potential customers.

senses.definition: to search the Internet for information about someone or something using the Google search engine

examples.x: Don't hesitate to google for solutions to common problems.
He googled the definition of a new word.
She googled the answer to her math question.
The team googled the history of the ancient civilization.
You can google travel tips for your upcoming trip.

senses.definition: to enter a username and password in order to gain access to a website, computer, etc.

examples.x: After you sign in, you'll have access to exclusive content.
He was unable to sign in because he forgot his password.
Please sign in with your username and password to access the website.
The website asks users to sign in for personalized recommendations.
We encourage all participants to sign in upon arrival.

senses.definition: to exit a computer account such as email, Instagram, etc. in a way that you have to re-enter your username and password in order to use it again

examples.x: Don't forget to sign out when you're done using the computer.
He accidentally left the account signed in and had to sign out remotely.
The security policy requires employees to sign out before leaving the office.

senses.definition: (of signals or data) representing and processing data as series of the digits 0 and 1 in electronic signals

examples.x: Many artists share their work on social media through digital platforms.
The library offers a collection of digital books that can be borrowed online.

senses.definition: newly received information about recent and important events

examples.x: I heard some exciting news about a job opportunity.
Our teacher shared some interesting news about a class trip.
She eagerly checked her phone for the latest news on the election results.
The journalist interviewed witnesses to gather firsthand news about the incident.
The news of the accident spread quickly through social media.

senses.definition: a representation of something, such as a person, object, or scene, created with a medium such as a photograph, painting, or drawing

examples.x: She captured a stunning image of a mountain peak with her camera.
The documentary included images of various endangered species in the wild.
The magazine featured an image of a famous celebrity on its cover.
The photographer exhibited a series of black and white images at the gallery.
The website used vibrant images to showcase its products.

senses.definition: to create something that is exactly like something else

examples.x: She copied the document to share it with her colleagues.
The secretary copied the original letter onto new stationery.
The printer copied the photo exactly onto the new paper.
The clerk copied the application form.
The designer copied the style from the original design for the new collection.
